CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Set For Trial On Mar-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE GROUP, RESIDENCE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint alleges fraud and negligent misrepresentation cause of action with requisite particularity, at least as to the post-loss events. Additionally, an insurer can be liable for negligent misrepresentation. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Continued To Apr-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE GROUP and RESIDENCE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT will be heard in Department 501, the real property and housing court, on April 14, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. All further motions in this case shall be noticed to be heard in department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Continued To May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ZHI ZHANG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar as moot. Plaintiff filed a first amended complaint on October 13, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAMIAN I. OKSENENDLER OF THE MANNION & LOWE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-733-1050 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JENNY H. WANG OF THE HINSHAW LLP, TEL. NO. 1-949-798-5878 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE GROUP and RESIDENCE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The demurrers to the reformation cause of action and bad faith based on the reformed contract cause of action are overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently pleads facts regarding the terms of the intended contract. Mercury Ins. Co. v. Pearson (2008) 169 Cal.App.4th 1064, 1073, is distinguishable because in that action, the reformation claim was based on a single conclusory allegation. The demurer to the fraud and negligent misrepresentation cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has 20 days leave to plead those claims with more particularity. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
